title: Moosend vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Moosend vs Sendinblue. See pricing, features, and which email marketing tool wins for your business.
h1: Moosend vs Sendinblue: Detailed Feature & Price Comparison
intro: Both Moosend and Sendinblue (now Brevo) are freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different needs. Moosend excels at unlimited email campaigns for small businesses, while Sendinblue offers a broader CRM suite with SMS and transactional email capabilities. This comparison helps you choose the right tool based on your specific requirements.
choose_a_if: You want the lowest cost email marketing with unlimited sends per month
You're a small business focused purely on email campaigns and automation
You prefer simplicity and an intuitive interface for beginners
choose_b_if: You need multi-channel marketing (email, SMS, WhatsApp, chat) in one platform
You require transactional email and API capabilities for developers
You want an all-in-one CRM solution beyond just email marketing

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Moosend is superior for pure email marketing at the lowest cost, while Sendinblue wins if you need multi-channel marketing, SMS, and CRM features. Sendinblue also offers a much larger free tier with 100,000 subscribers versus Moosend's 1,000.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Sendinblue's $25/month. However, Sendinblue's free tier is significantly more generous with 100,000 subscribers allowed versus Moosend's 1,000, making it better for growing businesses on a tight budget.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, you can switch between platforms. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign data. Both Moosend and Sendinblue provide import/export capabilities, though you may need to reconfigure automation workflows and design templates in the new platform.
